case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR VS. AHMED A. ABOUELSCOUD

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR ABOUELSCOUD, AHMED A.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ABOUELSCOUD, AHMED A. THE CITY SHOULD HAVE INCLUDED THESE FEES IN THE LIEN IT SERVED REGARDING THE DEFENDANT'S MEDICAL TREATMENT AT S.F. GENERAL HOSPITAL. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $940.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT ABOUELSCOUD, AHMED A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-18-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-18-2009 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED NOV-02-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$80.94) SERVED JUN-23-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ABOUELSCOUD, AHMED A.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-18-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-18-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD, CLERK: MARJORIE SCHWARTZ-SCOTT, NOT REPORTED (506) APPEARANCE BY BOTH SIDES. EXHIBITS RETAINED BY BOTH SIDES.
